content: [{'text': 'Now the arrow is pointing **downward (south)** and the front is completely clear (infinite range). The robot is at the edge of the upper corridor, and the arrow points toward the black wall below. But LiDAR says front is clear (infinite) — this means there might be a gap/passage in the black wall directly below! \n\nLooking at the map, the robot appears to be near a vertical passage between the upper and middle corridors. The LiDAR says front is clear, which is encouraging. Let me move forward carefully (small step) to navigate through this passage.', 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01Fve6pw2HfChg89ACh2of6p', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': 0.5}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
